secure.question: Is my data secure?
secure.answer: Yes! All file processing happens directly in your browser. Your files never leave your device or get uploaded to any server.

free.question: Is this service free?
free.answer: Yes, all our basic tools are completely free to use. We may introduce premium features in the future for advanced needs.

limits.question: Are there file size limits?
limits.answer: Yes, to ensure smooth performance in your browser, we limit file sizes to 50MB per file for most tools.

quality.question: Will my image quality be affected?
quality.answer: Our tools are designed to maintain the highest possible quality. For compression, you can adjust the quality slider to find the perfect balance.

footer.tagline: Fast, secure file conversion tools that work in your browser.
